title: E-Commerce Platform
desc: A full-featured online store built with Laravel and Vue.js, including product management, cart, and payment integration.

title: Corporate Website
desc: A responsive corporate website built on Drupal with custom modules, multilingual support, and a headless CMS setup.

title: Blog Platform
desc: A performant blog built on WordPress with a custom theme, SEO optimisation, and REST API integration.

title: REST API Service
desc: A RESTful API backend built with Laravel, featuring authentication, rate limiting, and comprehensive API documentation.

title: Community Portal
desc: A Drupal-powered community portal with user profiles, discussion forums, and event management functionality.

title: Portfolio Theme
desc: A custom WordPress theme built from scratch with a focus on performance, accessibility, and clean design.
